title: Guillque's Enhanced Axolotl
description: Vanilla-friendly custom texture for Bucket of Axolotl
body:
# Make your bucket list fancier !

**Guillque's Enhanced Axolotl** add custom texture on axolotl bucket depending which axolotl is !

**They have cute little animation too !**

_No mods needed ! Only 1.21.x !_
